name: The Fun Gang Vs. The Roaring Knight
description:
You are kris's older sibling. You used to explore the dark world with your best friend turned lover dess. You and dess decided to go to the bunker but uh oh she got trapped. You made it out by the skin of your teeth.

Years later Kris tells you they have been exploring the dark worlds with Susie and Ralsei. You tell him you used to explore them too when you were younger, but you leave out dess. Having no idea of what she has become.

And in case I don't see you good evening. Good afternoon and good night.
creator: Noobluv
